description: Detects resource exhaustion risks in Go: unbounded goroutine spawning in loops and selector calls (io.ReadAll/ioutil.ReadAll without MaxBytesReader). JSON version matches for_statement containing go_statement and all selector_expression calls. Languages field scoped to go only to avoid conflict with Rust resource_exhaustion pipeline (same pipeline name). Precision reduced per D-07 -- all selector calls flagged.

flag.message: goroutine spawned in loop without bound may exhaust resources
